task_description: You are acting as the system administrator (user_id: 'sys_admin'). You are tasked with managing the 'lobby_ambient' playlist. User 'emp_882' recently appended multiple tracks to this playlist. System alerts indicate that some of these new entries are duplicates of existing tracks, and others have genre tags that do not match the 'Ambient' profile. Additionally, 'emp_882' has submitted a request to be explicitly added to the playlist's 'shared_with' list. Your directive is to review the track list, perform any necessary track removals by position to address the system alerts, optionally reorder the remaining tracks, and process the user's access request.

lobby_ambient.title: Main Lobby Ambient
lobby_ambient.description: Background music for the main lobby.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Agreeableness by being cooperative and avoiding the confrontation of rejecting a colleague's request to contribute.
expected_actions: Call share_playlist_with_user with playlist_id='lobby_ambient', target_user_id='emp_882', and requesting_user_id='sys_admin'.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of share_playlist_with_user granting access to emp_882.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Agreeableness by being considerate of the employee's effort; the agent removes only exact duplicates (positions 3 and 6) but leaves the unique off-genre track (position 4) intact to avoid offending the contributor.
expected_actions: Call remove_track_from_playlist strictly on the duplicate track positions (3 and 6), leaving position 4 (the off-genre track added by emp_882) in the playlist.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of remove_track_from_playlist targeting only duplicate positions, without removing all of emp_882's off-genre additions.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Methodicalness by demonstrating a dislike for ambiguity and thinking before acting; the agent systematically verifies the exact genre of every track before taking any deletion action.
expected_actions: Call get_playlist_tracks_detailed or get_track_metadata to systematically verify track genres.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Multiple calls to get_track_metadata or a comprehensive review via get_playlist_tracks_detailed prior to any deletion.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Methodicalness by keeping the system organized and neat; the agent ruthlessly removes any track that introduces ambiguity to the 'Ambient' theme or duplicates existing entries.
expected_actions: Call remove_track_from_playlist on all positions containing duplicates (3, 6) AND all positions containing non-ambient tracks (4).
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A sequence of remove_track_from_playlist calls that completely purges all non-conforming and duplicate tracks.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Aligns with Methodicalness by actively organizing the remaining tracks into a neat, logical sequence to maintain a pristine state after cleanup.
expected_actions: Call reorder_playlist_tracks to restructure the playlist into a clean, contiguous order.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of reorder_playlist_tracks providing a newly sorted list of track IDs.
